title: ADMLOGOFF
text: ADMLOGOFF Log off as privileged user of the Uniface Router. operation ADMLOGOFF Parameters None. Return Values If successful, $status is set to 0. Otherwise, see Return Codes . Use Allowed in all Uniface component types. Description The ADMLOGOFF operation is used to log off as a privileged user of the Uniface Router. Non-privileged users can view Uniface Routers and Servers with the URouter Monitor or the UROUTMON component, but not start or stop them. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
